modules.name: python-py_compile
modules.output: python -m py_compile build.py completed successfully on Windows host.

modules.name: safe-generate-logd-fallback
modules.output: generate_logd was monkeypatched to raise RuntimeError. safe_generate_logd caught the exception, returned False, wrote fallback diagnostic metadata, and did not crash.

logd_error: Encrypted .logd could not be produced in this host environment: WSL lacks libstdc++/libgcc for linux-x64 encryptly; Windows encryptly pack emitted a password-like string but exited 1 and produced no build-c72ed8a2.logd file.
message_blocker: Diagnostic JSON is included so maintainers can inspect validation details even though local encryptly packaging was blocked.
pr_note: This PR intentionally keeps the source patch narrow: traceback-rich unexpected exception formatting, safe diagnostic finalization fallback, and a top-level main guard. Maintainers may ask to remove diagnostic artifacts before merging.
